tags.name: ui-mode-toggle
tags.description:
Events:

  * `color_scheme.change` - Dispatched when the UI mode (light/dark/system) or color scheme contrast is changed,
propagating the new `AppConfigs["colorScheme"]` details.

  * `colorschemechange` {} - Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the scheme changes.

  * `permanentcolorscheme` {} - Event from `dark-mode-toggle` when the persistence changes.

Attributes:

  * `mode` {"light" | "dark" | "system"} - Reflects the currently active color scheme mode.

  * `permanent` {boolean} - Controls whether the selected color scheme preference is persisted across sessions.

Properties:

  * `styles` - [object Object],[object Object]

  * `_darkModeToggle` - 

  * `onAppConfigsChange` - 

  * `colorSchemeChangeEventListener` - 

  * `permanentColorSchemeEventListener` - 

  * `mode` {"light" | "dark" | "system"} - Reflects the currently active color scheme mode.

  * `permanent` {boolean} - Controls whether the selected color scheme preference is persisted across sessions.

  * `_appConfigs` -

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description:
`mode` {"light" | "dark" | "system"} - Reflects the currently active color scheme mode.

Property: mode

Default: system

attributes.name: permanent
attributes.description:
`permanent` {boolean} - Controls whether the selected color scheme preference is persisted across sessions.

Property: permanent

Default: false

propagating the new `AppConfigs["colorScheme"]` details.
